executives.name: Chris Verrico
executives.background: Mr. Verrico has over 40 years of experience in the mining and exploration industry. He has served as a director and officer of several public companies, including Xiana Mining Inc. and various junior exploration companies. He has extensive experience in project management and corporate development.

executives.name: Aris Morfopoulos
executives.background: Mr. Morfopoulos is a corporate executive with over 30 years of experience in the management and administration of public companies. He has served as a director and officer of numerous companies listed on the TSX Venture Exchange and the Canadian Securities Exchange.

board_of_directors.name: Chris Verrico
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Verrico has over 40 years of experience in the mining and exploration industry. He has served as a director and officer of several public companies, including Xiana Mining Inc. and various junior exploration companies.

board_of_directors.name: Aris Morfopoulos
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Morfopoulos is a corporate executive with over 30 years of experience in the management and administration of public companies.

board_of_directors.name: Larry Segerstrom
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Segerstrom is a professional geologist with over 35 years of experience in the mining industry. He was formerly COO of Paramount Gold and Silver Corp. and has held senior positions with Freeport-McMoRan.

board_of_directors.name: Jack Bal
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Bal has over 25 years of experience in the capital markets and has served as a director and officer of several public companies. He is currently the CEO of Goldeneye Resources Corp.

sources.source_description: Company Website - Management and Directors Page
